package rulefixtures

// scenario for binary_read_for_single_field: `binary.Read(r, order, &singleField)` for reading a single integer
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule440PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario440Positive(records []Rule440PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
